'''layïfngïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnometer|pycnometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnometer|pycnometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| layïfngïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || læyïfngïfth || læyïfngïfj || læyïfngïfsh || læyïfngïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || layïfyïfngïfth || layïfyïfngïfj || layïfyïfngïfsh || layïfyïfngïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || layïfngïfth || layïfngïfj || layïfngïfsh || layïfngïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || layïffngïffth || layïffngïffj || layïffngïffsh || layïffngïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || layïfngïfïf || layïfngïfïf || layïfngïfïf || layïfngïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || layïfngïfth || layïfngïfj || layïfngïfsh || layïfngïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || layïfngïfïfl || layïfngïfïfl || layïfngïfïfl || layïfngïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || layïfngïfïfïf || layïfngïfïfïf || layïfngïfïfïf || layïfngïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || layïfngïfïfn || layïfngïfïfn || layïfngïfïfn || layïfngïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || layïfngïfïforo || layïfngïfïforo || layïfngïfïforo || layïfngïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
